title: AI Street Art Stencil
description: Renders the photo as a two-tone spray-paint stencil on a textured brick wall.
positive_prompt: Render the input photo as a two-tone spray-paint stencil on a textured, weathered urban brick wall in the style of Banksy. Preserve the number of people, recognizable identity, pose, camera angle, framing, and main composition. Use stark high-contrast black-and-white or two-tone paint layers with realistic paint overspray, delicate paint drips, stenciled edges, and clean graphic contrast against the brick texture. Rendering contract: Use the input image as visual ground truth. Keep the exact number of subjects and their left-to-right order, relative scale, pose, gaze, interaction, and key props. For every visible person, retain recognizable face geometry, age range, skin tone, hairstyle, and distinguishing features in a style-appropriate form; do not beautify, age, or swap identity unless explicitly requested. Preserve the source aspect ratio, camera viewpoint, and all important content inside the frame unless this effect explicitly calls for a different layout. Apply the transformation consistently to the subjects, clothing, props, and environment. Return one coherent finished image, not a before-and-after comparison, split screen, or unintended collage; use multiple frames or a decorative border only when this effect explicitly requests them. Include no readable text, letters, numerals, logos, signatures, watermarks, or interface elements unless explicitly requested.
negative_prompt: text, captions, logos, watermarks, signatures, full color photo, oil painting, smooth gradients, 3D render, extra people, distorted faces, malformed hands, duplicate limbs, duplicate face, low quality, blurry, identity drift, face swap, altered age, altered skin tone, wrong subject count, missing people, duplicated subject, merged subjects, inconsistent transformation, partial transformation, before-and-after, split screen, unintended collage, accidental crop, cut-off face, malformed anatomy, broken hands, fused fingers, extra fingers, extra limbs, incoherent perspective, floating objects, random text, gibberish letters, numerals, logo, watermark, signature, interface elements
custom_prompt_placeholder: e.g. Banksy style stencil, red spray highlights...
